name: Cangzhou Mingzhu Plastic Co., Ltd.
summary: Cangzhou Mingzhu Plastic Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells pressure and non-pressure pipeline systems, and films in China, the United States, Europe, the Middle East, Southeast Asia, and internationally. It offers gas pipes, water supply pipes, biaxially-oriented polyamide films, pipe fittings, and lithium ion battery separators. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Cangzhou, China.
